workflow.name: Generate research-backed infographics with GPT-4, kie.ai, and Gmail
workflow.description:
## How it works

- A web form collects your infographic parameters: headline, topic, art style, layout, color palette, aspect ratio, resolution, etc.
- An AI Agent (GPT-4 with live web search) researches your topic and writes an optimized prompt for the image generator
- The prompt is submitted to kie.ai's **nano-banana-pro** model to generate the infographic
- The workflow polls kie.ai every 15 seconds until the image is ready (up to ~5 minutes)
- On success, the finished infographic is emailed to you as an attachment; on failure, a detailed error email is sent instead

## Set up steps

- Set up takes about 5 minutes
- Add your **OpenAI API key** (for the AI research agent)
- Add your **kie.ai API key** as a Header Auth credential (used by the generate and polling nodes)
- Connect your **Gmail account** and update the recipient email address in the two Gmail nodes
- Activate the workflow and open the form URL to start generating

workflow.name: Generate Research-Backed Infographics with AI and kie.ai

values.placeholder: The Future of Solar Energy (5-7 words)

Horizontal linear flow from left to right

parameters.formDescription: Use AI to Generate Well-Researched, High-Quality Infographics

parameters.message: Hi, the new infographic is attached to this email.
parameters.subject: New infographic generated

parameters.content:
## 🖼️ AI Infographic Generator

**Generate research-backed, professionally designed infographics using GPT-4 web search and kie.ai's image AI - no design skills needed.**

---

### Who is this for
- Marketers & content creators who need data-driven visuals fast
- Educators and consultants producing professional infographics
- Anyone who wants to turn a topic into a polished visual without Canva or Photoshop

---

### How it works
1. User fills in a form (headline, topic, style, layout, colors, resolution, etc.)
2. An AI Agent (GPT-4 with web search) researches the topic and writes an optimized image generation prompt
3. The prompt is sent to **kie.ai** (nano-banana-pro model) to generate the infographic
4. The workflow polls for completion every 15 seconds (up to 20 retries / ~5 min)
5. On success: the image is downloaded and emailed as an attachment
6. On failure or timeout: a detailed error email is sent instead

---

### Setup
1. **OpenAI** - Add your OpenAI API key to the `Researcher` node credential
2. **kie.ai** - Add your kie.ai Bearer token to a `Header Auth` credential and connect it to `Generate Infographic` and `Check Job Status`
3. **Gmail** - Connect your Gmail account to `Email Image to User` and `Send Error Email`
4. Update the recipient (To) email address in both Gmail nodes
5. Activate the workflow and open the form URL

## ② AI Prompt Engineering
GPT-4 with web search researches your topic and writes an optimized image generation prompt.

## ③ Generate & Poll
Submits the job to kie.ai, then polls every 15s until complete, failed, or timed out (20 retries max).

## ④ Success
Downloads the generated image and emails it as an attachment.

## ⑤ Error Handling
Handles 3 failure scenarios: generation failure, polling timeout (>20 retries), and API errors. Sends a descriptive error email for each case.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
